summary: Lee Gilmore is an AWS Serverless Hero from the UK who specialises in event-driven architectures, the AWS CDK, domain-driven design, and clean code. Lee is also an international speaker, lead architect, writer, OSS contributor, and engineer, with a passion for building enterprise-grade scalable serverless architectures in the cloud, and building high-performing teams based on trust, vision, and empathy. Lee is also the owner of the Serverless Patterns registry with over 100 free open source solutions and detailed articles: https://www.serverlessadvocate.com/patterns and runs a weekly Serverless newsletter: https://serverlessadvocate.substack.com/ Lee also owns https://cloud-cards.com/ which allows users to do micro-learning in their own time, across the categories: software patterns, CICD, engineering, and domain-driven design.
